name: Fundo Investec IMB Shopping West Plaza Fund
summary: Fundo Investec IMB Shopping West Plaza Fund is a real estate investment fund (FII) focused on investing in the West Plaza Shopping Center in São Paulo, Brazil, aiming to generate income for investors through the rental of commercial spaces within the mall. The fund's strategy involves the acquisition, management, and development of real estate assets, primarily targeting the retail sector. It is managed by Investec Asset Management.
